# Seacoast Building & Design

> Seacoast Building & Design is a licensed general contractor serving six counties across Southwest Florida (Hillsborough, Manatee, Sarasota, Charlotte, Lee, and Collier). The company specializes in roofing, exterior renovations, storm damage repair, storm preparedness, container builds, and property expansion services. Over 40 years in business.

## Contact
- Phone: (941) 500-5431
- Website: https://seacoastbd.com
- Location: Fort Myers, FL

## Services

### Protect
- Storm Preparedness: Pre-season inspections, custom shutter and board fitting, supply delivery, and priority emergency response.
- Storm Damage Repair: Insurance documentation, adjuster coordination, scope-of-loss reports, and full repair from roof to gutters to siding.
- Emergency Response: Same-day boarding, shuttering, supply delivery, and immediate damage stabilization. 24/7 line: (941) 500-5431.
- Roof Certification Inspection: Insurance-ready roof certification reports with photos, condition notes, and estimated remaining roof life.

### Improve
- Professional Roofing: Tile, metal (standing seam, R-panel, stone-coated steel), TPO/flat, shingle, and slate-profile systems. Residential and commercial.
- Gutters, Fascia & Soffits: Seamless aluminum and copper gutters, vented soffits, and fascia replacement.
- Siding: James Hardie fiber cement and other durable siding systems.
- Windows & Doors: Impact-rated window and door installation for hurricane protection.
- Exterior Renovations: Full exterior transformations including structural repairs, paint, trim, cladding, and lighting.
- Exterior Cleaning: Soft washing, pressure washing, roof cleaning, concrete cleaning, gutter cleaning, and solar panel cleaning.
- Solar Services: Solar panels, inverters, battery storage, EV charging stations, and system maintenance.

### Expand
- Container Guest Houses: Custom-finished container guest houses starting at $32,000, Cat-5-rated, built for Florida living.
- Container Offices: On-property container offices starting at $28,000 with full electrical, HVAC, and insulation.
- Container Storage: Cat-5-rated container storage units starting at $9,500 with optional shelving, electrical, and climate control.
- Container Storm Shelters: Reinforced container storm shelters starting at $34,000, engineered for Category 5 wind loads.
- Pool Enclosures & Lanais: Screen enclosures and outdoor living structures built to Florida building code.
- Room Additions: Sunrooms, enclosed patios, garage conversions, and traditional room additions.

## Service Area
Hillsborough County, Manatee County, Sarasota County, Charlotte County, Lee County, and Collier County, Florida. Cities include Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Naples, Sarasota, Bradenton, Port Charlotte, Tampa, and Bonita Springs.

## Key Differentiators
- Every project documented on video from start to finish
- 40+ years of Southwest Florida project history
- Licensed and insured general contractor
- Full storm lifecycle coverage (prep, emergency, repair) under one license
- Container building capability unique to SW Florida contractors
- Hearth financing available for qualified projects
